title: Active Inference of Extended Finite State Machine Models with Registers and Guards
authors: Roland Groz, German Eduardo Vega Baez, Adenilso Simao, Catherine Oriat, Neil Walkinshaw, Michael Foster
abstract: Extended finite state machines (EFSMs) model stateful systems with internal data variables and have numerous applications in software engineering. A major advantage of this type of model lies in its ability to model both the data flow and the data-dependent control behaviour. In the absence of such models, it is desirable to reverse-engineer them by observing the system's behaviour. However, existing approaches generally require the ability to reset the system during inference, or can only handle situations where the control flow depends exclusively on the input parameters, and not on the values of the stored data. In this work, we present a black-box active learning algorithm that infers EFSMs with guards and registers, and which significantly relaxes the assumptions that have to be made about the system in comparison to previous attempts.
title_zh: 具有寄存器和保护条件的扩展有限状态机模型的主动推断
abstract_zh: 扩展的有限状态机（EFSM）通过内部数据变量对具有状态的系统进行建模，在软件工程中有着广泛的应用。这类模型的一个主要优势在于能够同时描述数据流以及依赖于数据的控制行为。在缺乏此类模型的情况下，通过观察系统的行为将其逆向推导出来是十分理想的。然而，现有的方法通常要求在推断过程中能够重置系统，或者只能处理控制流完全依赖于输入参数而与存储数据值无关的情况。本文提出了一种黑盒主动学习算法，用于推断带有保护条件和寄存器的EFSM，与以往方法相比，该算法显著放宽了对系统所需做出的假设条件。

title: Generalizing Test Cases for Comprehensive Test Scenario Coverage
authors: Binhang Qi, Yun Lin, Xinyi Weng, Chenyan Liu, Hailong Sun, Gordon Fraser, Jin Song Dong
abstract: Test cases are essential for software development and maintenance. In practice, developers derive multiple test cases from an implicit pattern based on their understanding of requirements and inference of diverse test scenarios, each validating a specific behavior of the focal method. However, producing comprehensive tests is time-consuming and error-prone: many important tests that should have accompanied the initial test are added only after a significant delay, sometimes only after bugs are triggered. Existing automated test generation techniques largely focus on code coverage. Yet in real projects, practical tests are seldom driven by code coverage alone, since test scenarios do not necessarily align with control-flow branches. Instead, test scenarios originate from requirements, which are often undocumented and implicitly embedded in a project's design and implementation. However, developer-written tests are frequently treated as executable specifications; thus, even a single initial test that reflects the developer's intent can reveal the underlying requirement and the diverse scenarios that should be validated. In this work, we propose TestGeneralizer, a framework for generalizing test cases to comprehensively cover test scenarios. TestGeneralizer orchestrates three stages: (1) enhancing the understanding of the requirement and scenario behind the focal method and initial test; (2) generating a test scenario template and crystallizing it into various test scenario instances; and (3) generating and refining executable test cases from these instances. We evaluate TestGeneralizer against three state-of-the-art baselines on 12 open-source Java projects. TestGeneralizer achieves significant improvements: +31.66% and +23.08% over ChatTester, in mutation-based and LLM-assessed scenario coverage, respectively.
title_zh: 推广测试用例以实现全面的测试场景覆盖
abstract_zh: 测试用例对于软件开发和维护至关重要。在实际开发中，开发者通常基于对需求的理解以及对多种测试场景的推断，从一种隐含的模式中衍生出多个测试用例，每个用例用于验证目标方法的特定行为。然而，生成全面的测试用例既耗时又容易出错：许多本应在初始阶段就包含的重要测试往往被严重延迟添加，有时甚至只有在触发缺陷后才被补上。现有的自动化测试生成技术主要关注代码覆盖率。但在真实项目中，实用的测试很少仅由代码覆盖率驱动，因为测试场景并不一定与控制流分支完全对应。相反，测试场景源于需求，而这些需求常常未被明确记录，而是隐式地嵌入在项目的设计与实现之中。然而，开发者编写的测试通常被视为可执行的规格说明；因此，即使只有一个反映开发者意图的初始测试，也可能揭示出潜在的需求以及需要验证的多样化场景。在本研究中，我们提出了TestGeneralizer，一个用于泛化测试用例以全面覆盖测试场景的框架。TestGeneralizer协调三个阶段：（1）增强对目标方法及其初始测试背后需求与场景的理解；（2）生成测试场景模板，并将其具体化为多种测试场景实例；（3）从这些实例生成并优化可执行的测试用例。我们在12个开源Java项目上将TestGeneralizer与三种最先进的基线方法进行了对比评估。实验结果表明，TestGeneralizer取得了显著提升：在基于变异和基于大语言模型评估的场景覆盖率方面，分别比ChatTester高出31.66%和23.08%。

title: A-IC3: Learning-Guided Adaptive Inductive Generalization for Hardware Model Checking
authors: Xiaofeng Zhou, Guangyu Hu, Hongce Zhang, Wei Zhang
abstract: The IC3 algorithm represents the state-of-the-art (SOTA) hardware model checking technique, owing to its robust performance and scalability. A significant body of research has focused on enhancing the solving efficiency of the IC3 algorithm, with particular attention to the inductive generalization process: a critical phase wherein the algorithm seeks to generalize a counterexample to inductiveness (CTI), which typically is a state leading to a bad state, into a broader set of states. This inductive generalization is a primary source of clauses in IC3 and thus plays a pivotal role in determining the overall effectiveness of the algorithm. Despite its importance, existing approaches often rely on fixed inductive generalization strategies, overlooking the dynamic and context-sensitive nature of the verification environment in which spurious counterexamples arise. This rigidity can limit the quality of generated clauses and, consequently, the performance of IC3. To address this limitation, we propose a lightweight machine-learning-based framework that dynamically selects appropriate inductive generalization strategies in response to the evolving verification context. Specifically, we employ a multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithm to adaptively choose inductive generalization strategies based on real-time feedback from the verification process. The agent is updated by evaluating the quality of generalization outcomes, thereby refining its strategy selection over time. Empirical evaluation on a benchmark suite comprising 914 instances, primarily drawn from the latest HWMCC collection, demonstrates the efficacy of our approach. When implemented on the state-of-the-art model checker rIC3, our method solves 26 to 50 more cases than the baselines and improves the PAR-2 score by 194.72 to 389.29.
title_zh: A-IC3：面向硬件模型检测的学习引导自适应归纳泛化
abstract_zh:
IC3算法因其强大的性能和可扩展性，代表了当前最先进的（SOTA）硬件模型检测技术。大量研究致力于提升IC3算法的求解效率，尤其关注其中的归纳泛化过程：这是算法将反例归纳为归纳性质（CTI，通常是指通向错误状态的状态）并推广到更广泛状态集合的关键阶段。这种归纳泛化是IC3中子句生成的主要来源之一，因此对算法整体有效性起着决定性作用。尽管其重要性显著，现有方法通常依赖固定的归纳泛化策略，忽视了验证环境中反例出现所具有的动态性和上下文敏感性。这种僵化性可能限制所生成子句的质量，从而影响IC3的整体性能。

为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种轻量级、基于机器学习的框架，能够根据不断变化的验证上下文动态选择合适的归纳泛化策略。具体而言，我们采用多臂赌博机（MAB）算法，依据验证过程中的实时反馈来自适应地选择归纳泛化策略。智能体通过评估泛化结果的质量来持续更新自身，从而随时间推移优化其策略选择。在包含914个实例的基准测试集（主要来自最新的HWMCC数据集）上的实验评估表明，该方法具有显著效果。当集成到最先进的模型检测工具rIC3中时，我们的方法比基线方法多解决26至50个案例，并将PAR-2得分提高了194.72至389.29。

title: SpecSyn: LLM-based Synthesis and Refinement of Formal Specifications for Real-world Program Verification
authors: Lezhi Ma, Shangqing Liu, Yi Li, Qiong Wu, Han Wang, Lei Bu
abstract: Program verification is a formal technique to rigorously ensure the correctness and fault-freeness of software systems. However, constructing comprehensive interprocedural specifications for full verification obligations is time-consuming and labor-intensive, giving rise to automated specification generation approaches. Despite the significant advancements in these approaches brought by Large Language Models (LLMs), existing LLM-empowered approaches still suffer from significant limitations: they lack effective strategies for handling sizable input programs, and are typically equipped with no mechanisms to evaluate and guarantee the strength of the generated specifications. The limitations impair their ability to extract precise specifications from real-world complicated programs to support the verification of target properties, thereby hindering the applicability of existing approaches in verification tasks on real-world programs. To remedy this gap, we propose SpecSyn, a novel LLM-based specification generation method. SpecSyn first decomposes the input program into individual segments, which are handled respectively by the subsequent iterative specification generation process. Innovatively, we incorporate into the process a specification refinement mechanism based on semantic-non-equivalent program mutations and variant discrimination, assessing and enhancing the semantic strength of the generated specifications. Extensive experiments show that SpecSyn maintains high precision over 90% and outstanding recall over 75%, significantly outperforming existing LLM-based approaches. In further evaluations, SpecSyn successfully handles 1071 out of 1365 target properties for open-source programs, proving its applicability on real-world program verification tasks.
title_zh: SpecSyn：基于大语言模型的现实世界程序验证形式化规约的合成与精化
abstract_zh: 程序验证是一种形式化技术，用于严格确保软件系统的正确性和无故障性。然而，为完成完整的验证任务而构建全面的过程间规约耗时且费力，这促使了自动化规约生成方法的发展。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在这些方法上带来了显著进展，现有的基于LLM的方法仍存在明显局限：它们缺乏有效处理大规模输入程序的策略，通常也没有机制来评估和保证所生成规约的强度。这些局限削弱了它们从现实世界复杂程序中提取精确规约以支持目标属性验证的能力，从而限制了现有方法在真实程序验证任务中的适用性。为弥补这一不足，我们提出了SpecSyn，一种新颖的基于LLM的规约生成方法。SpecSyn首先将输入程序分解为多个独立片段，并由后续的迭代规约生成过程分别处理。创新之处在于，我们在该过程中引入了一种基于语义非等价程序变异与变体区分的规约精化机制，用以评估并增强所生成规约的语义强度。大量实验表明，SpecSyn保持了超过90%的高精度和超过75%的出色召回率，显著优于现有的基于LLM的方法。在进一步评估中，SpecSyn成功处理了开源程序中的1365项目标属性中的1071项，证明了其在真实程序验证任务中的实际适用性。

title: Doubly Saturated Ramsey Graphs: A Case Study in Computer-Assisted Mathematical Discovery
authors: Benjamin Przybocki, John Mackey, Marijn J. H. Heule, Bernardo Subercaseaux
abstract: Ramsey-good graphs are graphs that contain neither a clique of size $s$ nor an independent set of size $t$. We study doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, defined as Ramsey-good graphs in which the addition or removal of any edge necessarily creates an $s$-clique or a $t$-independent set. We present a method combining SAT solving with bespoke LLM-generated code to discover infinite families of such graphs, answering a question of Grinstead and Roberts from 1982. In addition, we use LLMs to generate and formalize correctness proofs in Lean. This case study highlights the potential of integrating automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification to accelerate mathematical discovery. We argue that such tool-driven workflows will play an increasingly central role in experimental mathematics.
title_zh: 双饱和拉姆齐图：计算机辅助数学发现的案例研究
abstract_zh: 拉姆齐优良图（Ramsey-good graphs）是指既不包含大小为 $s$ 的团，也不包含大小为 $t$ 的独立集的图。我们研究双重饱和的拉姆齐优良图，即在其中添加或删除任意一条边都会必然产生一个大小为 $s$ 的团或一个大小为 $t$ 的独立集的图。本文提出了一种结合SAT求解与定制化由大语言模型（LLM）生成代码的方法，用于发现此类图的无穷族，从而回答了Grinstead和Roberts在1982年提出的一个问题。此外，我们还利用大语言模型生成并在证明助手Lean中形式化了正确性证明。这一案例研究突显了将自动推理、大语言模型与形式化验证相结合，在加速数学发现方面的巨大潜力。我们认为，这类以工具驱动的工作流程将在实验数学中发挥日益核心的作用。

title: SPAC: Automating FPGA-based Network Switches with Protocol Adaptive Customization
authors: Guoyu Li, Yang Cao, Lucas H L Ng, Alexander Charlton, Qianzhou Wang, Will Punter, Philippos Papaphilippou, Ce Guo, Hongxiang Fan, Wayne Luk, Saman Amarasinghe, Ajay Brahmakshatriya
abstract: With network requirements diverging across emerging applications, latency-critical services demand minimal logic delay, while hyperscale training and collectives require sustained line-rate throughput for synchronized bulk transfers. This divergence creates an urgent need for custom network switches tailored to specialized protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. This paper presents SPAC (Switch and Protocol Adaptive Customization), a novel approach that automates the generation of FPGA-based network switches co-optimized for custom protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. SPAC introduces a unified workflow with a domain-specific language (DSL) for protocol-architecture co-design, a library of modular HLS-based adaptive switch components, and a trace-aware Design Space Exploration (DSE) engine. By providing a multi-fidelity simulation stack, SPAC enables rapid identification of Pareto-optimal designs prior to deployment. We demonstrate the efficacy of the domain-specific adaptation of SPAC across a spectrum of real-world scenarios, spanning from latency-sensitive sensor and HFT networks to hyperscale datacenter fabrics. Experimental results show that by tailoring the micro-architecture and protocol to the specific workload, SPAC-generated designs reduce LUT and BRAM usage by 55% and 53%, respectively. Compared to fixed-architecture counterparts, SPAC delivers latency reductions ranging from 7.8% to 38.4% across various tasks while maintaining adequate resource consumption and packet drop rate.
title_zh: SPAC：通过协议自适应定制实现基于FPGA的网络交换机自动化
abstract_zh: 随着新兴应用的网络需求日益分化，对延迟敏感的服务要求尽可能小的逻辑延迟，而超大规模训练和集合通信则需要持续的线速吞吐量以实现同步批量传输。这种分化迫切需要针对专用协议和特定应用场景流量模式定制的网络交换机。本文提出SPAC（交换机与协议自适应定制），一种新型方法，可自动生成功能协同优化于自定义协议和特定应用流量模式的基于FPGA的网络交换机。SPAC引入了一个统一的工作流程，包括用于协议-架构协同设计的领域特定语言（DSL）、基于模块化HLS的可适应交换组件库，以及具备追踪感知能力的设计空间探索（DSE）引擎。通过提供多保真度仿真堆栈，SPAC能够在部署前快速识别帕累托最优设计。我们展示了SPAC在一系列真实场景中的领域自适应有效性，涵盖从对延迟敏感的传感器网络和高频交易（HFT）网络，到超大规模数据中心互连架构。实验结果表明，通过将微架构和协议针对特定工作负载进行定制，SPAC生成的设计分别减少了55%的LUT和53%的BRAM资源使用。与固定架构的同类方案相比，SPAC在不同任务中实现了7.8%至38.4%的延迟降低，同时保持了合理的资源消耗和数据包丢弃率。

title: Testing of Passive Memristive Crossbars in AI Hardware Accelerators
authors: Shanmukha Mangadahalli Siddaramu, Mahta Mayahinia, Surendra Hemaram, Sule Ozev, Mehdi B. Tahoori
abstract: Memristor-based computation-in-memory (CiM) architectures address the growing computational demands of AI accelerators by enabling analog matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) directly within the memory array. Passive (selectorless) memristive crossbars are particularly attractive for such architectures due to their high density and compatibility with back-end-of-line fabrication. Here, AI model parameters are stored as memristor conductances, and MVM is performed in situ by activating multiple rows simultaneously and sensing the resulting column currents. As a result, column currents become the primary observable, making column-level fault detection more relevant for AI workloads than conventional March-based cell-level tests, which are specially time - and energy-intensive for passive crossbars due to specialized biasing methods. To address this, we propose a current-based testing methodology tailored to passive crossbars that detects and diagnoses faulty columns while accounting for non-idealities such as sneak-path currents, line resistance, and process variations. Faulty columns are detected by programming all cells to a uniform state and measuring column-current deviations, followed by targeted test patterns to estimate per-column fault density. On a $64 \times 64$ array, the proposed approach achieves 100% faulty column detection, 98% overall fault coverage, and a $2.3 \times$ speed-up in test time compared to conventional March tests. Hence, providing a fast and efficient solution for manufacturing screening of passive crossbars with sufficient diagnostic resolution to support systemlevel fault tolerance for AI applications.
title_zh: 人工智能硬件加速器中无源忆阻交叉阵列的测试
abstract_zh:
基于忆阻器的存内计算（CiM）架构通过在存储器阵列内部直接执行模拟矩阵-向量乘法（MVM），满足了人工智能加速器日益增长的计算需求。其中，无源（无选通管）忆阻交叉阵列因其高密度和与后端工艺（back-end-of-line）制造的兼容性，在此类架构中尤为具有吸引力。在此类系统中，AI模型参数以忆阻器电导的形式存储，并通过同时激活多行并检测各列输出电流的方式原位执行MVM操作。因此，列电流成为主要可观测变量，使得面向列级的故障检测比传统的基于“March”测试的单元级检测更适用于AI工作负载——后者在无源交叉阵列中因需要特殊的偏置方法而带来高昂的时间和能量开销。

为解决这一问题，本文提出一种面向无源交叉阵列的、基于电流的测试方法，可在考虑串扰电流（sneak-path currents）、线路电阻和工艺偏差等非理想因素的前提下，实现对故障列的检测与诊断。该方法首先将所有忆阻器单元编程至统一状态，通过测量各列电流的偏差来识别故障列，随后采用有针对性的测试模式进一步估计每列的故障密度。在64×64阵列上的实验结果表明，所提方法实现了100%的故障列检出率、98%的整体故障覆盖率，并相比传统March测试缩短了2.3倍的测试时间。因此，该方案为无源交叉阵列的量产筛选提供了一种快速高效的测试手段，具备足够的诊断分辨率，可支持面向AI应用的系统级容错机制。

title: Design and Implementation of 32-bit Pipelined RISC Processor with VLSI optimized ALU and AI Acceleration : Efficient Pipeline Architecture with High Performance ALU Optimization
authors: Nithin V Y, Pramod Raj T, Shraddha Kalmath, Srushti R, Hariprasad T L
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Designing and implementing high-performance processors requires a trade-off between speed, area, and energy efficiency, increasingly relevant in modern computing environments where artificial intelligence (AI) workloads comprise a growing share of the total workloads. This paper presents the architecture and implementation of a 32-bit pipelined RISC processor with a VLSI-optimized Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU), coupled with the processor’s specific AI acceleration. The processor uses a five-stage instruction pipeline—fetch, decode, execute, memory access, and write-back—to boost instruction throughput while reducing structural and data hazards. The ALU has been optimized at the transistor and gate levels to use low power while minimizing critical path delay for energy-efficient silicon real estate. Furthermore, an AI acceleration unit has been added to perform computationally heavy tasks, like machine learning inference, based on combining specialized multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations with parallel datapath structure. The processor was implemented in Verilog HDL, verified in ModelSim simulation, and shows statistically significant improvement in execution performance over a baseline RISC implementation, while minimizing hardware complexity. We further synthesised the design onto FPGA and explored area, timing, and power trade-offs to confirm viability for System-on-Chip (SoC) for embedded platforms. This work enhances capabilities in the development of energy-efficiend SoCs.
title_zh: 具有VLSI优化ALU和AI加速功能的32位流水线RISC处理器的设计与实现：高效流水线架构与高性能ALU优化
abstract_zh: 设计和实现高性能处理器需要在速度、面积和能效之间进行权衡，这一问题在现代计算环境中日益重要，因为人工智能（AI）工作负载在总体计算任务中所占比例不断增长。本文提出了一种32位流水线式精简指令集（RISC）处理器的架构与实现方案，该处理器配备针对超大规模集成电路（VLSI）优化的算术逻辑单元（ALU），并集成了面向特定AI任务的加速模块。该处理器采用五级指令流水线——取指、译码、执行、访存和写回，以提高指令吞吐量，并减少结构冲突和数据冒险。ALU在晶体管级和门级进行了优化，在降低功耗的同时最小化关键路径延迟，从而实现节能高效的芯片面积利用。此外，处理器还集成了一种AI加速单元，通过结合专用的乘累加（MAC）操作与并行数据通路结构，高效执行机器学习推理等计算密集型任务。该处理器使用Verilog硬件描述语言（HDL）实现，并在ModelSim仿真环境中完成验证，结果表明其执行性能相较于基准RISC实现具有统计学意义上的显著提升，同时保持了较低的硬件复杂度。我们进一步将设计综合到现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上，分析了面积、时序和功耗之间的权衡关系，验证了其在嵌入式平台系统级芯片（SoC）应用中的可行性。本研究为开发高能效的SoC提供了有力支持，增强了相关领域的技术能力。

title: Automatic Cell-Aware Software-Based Self-Test Generation for a RISC-V Core Local Interrupt Controller
abstract: Software-Based Self-Tests (SBST) allow for at-speed testing of on-chip devices via a processor core. However, creating SBSTs requires time-consuming manual labour that is expensive and requires in-depth knowledge of the device’s architecture for targeting hard-to-test faults. Introducing cell-aware testing to this task further exacerbates the necessary effort. In contrast, automating the complex parts of SBST generation using Bounded Model Checking (BMC) allows using sophisticated, state-of-theart BMC solvers to automatically generate vast parts of the SBST. Thereby, a virtual circuit called Validity Checker Module (VCM) is used to encode constraints for the SBST. In this paper, we focus on generating a cell-aware SBST for a Core Local Interrupt Controller (CLIC) that is executed via a RISC-V processor core. We first d erive a constraint s et that creates SBST-like conditions during ATPG, which allows for transformation into instructions later on. We implement a cellaware test model via a re-entrant Mealy state machine that allows complex behaviors of the faulty cell. Experimentally, we extend the CLIC with a test interface that is controlled via a custom CSR of the processor core to reduce SBST generation time and enhance fault coverage. We conclude with the evaluation of our approach on the PULP CLIC implementation that shows cellaware SBST generation to be feasible while achieving acceptable fault coverages and practical generation runtimes.
title_zh: 用于RISC-V核心本地中断控制器的自动单元感知软件自测试生成
abstract_zh: 基于软件的自测试（SBST）可通过处理器核心实现对片上器件的全速测试。然而，创建SBST需要耗时且昂贵的手动工作，且要求深入了解器件架构，以针对难以测试的故障进行有效覆盖。若将单元感知测试（cell-aware testing）引入该任务，所需的工作量将进一步增加。相比之下，利用有界模型检验（BMC）来自动化SBST生成中的复杂部分，可借助先进的、最先进的BMC求解器自动产生SBST的大部分内容。在此过程中，使用一种称为有效性检查模块（Validity Checker Module, VCM）的虚拟电路来为SBST编码约束条件。本文聚焦于为通过RISC-V处理器核心执行的核本地中断控制器（CLIC）生成支持单元感知的SBST。我们首先推导出一组约束条件，使其在ATPG期间产生类似SBST的测试环境，以便后续转换为指令。我们通过一个可重入的Mealy状态机实现了一个单元感知的测试模型，以支持故障单元的复杂行为。实验中，我们为CLIC扩展了一个测试接口，并通过处理器核心的一个自定义CSR对其进行控制，从而缩短SBST生成时间并提高故障覆盖率。最后，我们在PULP CLIC实现上评估了所提出的方法，结果表明，生成支持单元感知的SBST是可行的，同时实现了可接受的故障覆盖率和实用的生成运行时间。

title: Design and Verification of AHB to I2C Protocol
authors: Krithika A, Ravikumar M, Nagesh K N, Veerappa Chikkagoudar
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Transfer of data between low-speed external devices and high-speed system buses is frequently necessary for modern System-on-Chip (SoC) platforms. The Advanced High-performance Bus (AHB) provides parallel, high-throughput data transfers suitable for processors and memory units; However, the Inter Integrated Circuit (I2C) network protocol provides a straightforward two-wire serial interface that is frequently utilized for control devices, sensors, and memories. Direct data exchange between these protocols is not possible due to their architectural differences. The implementation and validation of an AHB-to I2C networking connection using Verilog HDL are presented in this paper. The suggested design functions as an AHB slave to record parallel transactions and transform them into serial data that is compatible with I2C for peripheral communication. The simulation and implementation in the Synopsys environment were used to validate the design, which was written in Verilog HDL. The findings accurately verify that the AHB to I2C protocol interface is a good fit for SoC applications requiring communication between low-speed peripheral modules and high-speed cores
abstract_zh: 在现代片上系统（SoC）平台中，低速外部设备与高速系统总线之间的数据传输经常是必要的。高级高性能总线（AHB）提供适用于处理器和存储单元的并行、高吞吐量数据传输；然而，集成电路间（I2C）网络协议则提供一种简单的双线串行接口，常用于控制设备、传感器和存储器。由于两者架构不同，这些协议之间无法直接进行数据交换。本文提出了一种基于Verilog HDL实现和验证的AHB到I2C网络连接方案。所设计的模块作为AHB从设备，接收并行事务，并将其转换为符合I2C协议的串行数据，以实现与外设的通信。该设计采用Verilog HDL编写，并通过Synopsys环境中的仿真与实现完成验证。结果准确表明，AHB到I2C的协议接口非常适合需要低速外设模块与高速核心之间通信的SoC应用。

title: Fault-Aware Repair Scheme for Inter-Die Interconnects of Chiplet-Based Chips
authors: Yi-Chun Huang, Jin-Fu Li, Hong-Siang Fu, Yung-Ping Lee
abstract: In the chiplet-based chip, multiple dies are communicated through a large amount of inter-die interconnects. The bonding interfaces, e.g., microbumps (ubumps), of the interdie interconnects are prone to defects during the assembly process. Effective yield-enhancement techniques for inter-die interconnects thus are needed to ensure the yield of chiplet-based ICs. In this paper, we propose a fault-aware repair technique for inter-die interconnects. A test and diagnosis method is proposed to distinguish single-net faults from multi-net faults and identify the interconnects of a multi-net fault. Then, a shift and broadcast reconfiguration method is used to repair two interconnects with a short defect using one spare interconnect. Simulation and analysis results show that the proposed fault-aware repair technique can effectively increase the repair rate.
title_zh: 面向芯粒芯片芯片间互连的容错修复方案
abstract_zh: 在基于芯粒（chiplet）的芯片中，多个芯粒通过大量的芯粒间互连进行通信。这些互连的键合接口（例如微凸点，即ubumps）在组装过程中容易产生缺陷。因此，需要有效的良率提升技术来保证基于芯粒的集成电路的整体良率。本文提出了一种面向芯粒间互连的容错修复技术。首先，提出一种测试与诊断方法，用于区分单网络故障与多网络故障，并识别出多网络故障中的具体互连。然后，采用一种“移位与广播”重构方法，利用一条备用互连修复两条存在短路缺陷的互连。仿真与分析结果表明，所提出的容错修复技术能够有效提高修复率。

title: Toward a Stealth-Capable 5G-AKA: Secure Key Distribution with Covert Channel Integration for Future-Sensitive Military Applications
authors: Yongho Ko, Seonghan Shin, Hoseok Kwon, Ilsun You
abstract: Secure and covert key establishment is increasingly important in tactical and intermittently connected military 5G environments, where authentication traffic may be observable and captured traffic may remain valuable after transmission. However, the standard 3rd Generation Partnership Project (3GPP) 5G Authentication and Key Agreement (5G-AKA) protocol provides neither covert key establishment nor forward secrecy beyond its conventional key hierarchy. To address this limitation, this paper proposes Stealth-5G-AKA, a compact enhancement that embeds a fragmented stealth Elliptic-Curve Diffie–Hellman (ECDH) exchange into standard 5G-AKA challenge–response signaling without modifying the visible message flow or the 5G core authentication architecture. The Home Network splits a 256-bit ephemeral ECDH public value into two 128-bit fragments and conceals them across successive random challenges. After receiving both fragments, the User Equipment reconstructs the hidden public value, derives a covert shared secret, and generates a stealth anchor key K′SEAF alongside the conventional KSEAF. Formal verification in ProVerif under the Dolev–Yao adversarial model shows that Stealth-5G-AKA preserves secrecy and mutual authentication, achieves indistinguishability of stealth executions, and provides forward secrecy for K′SEAF even if long-term subscriber credentials are compromised after protocol completion. Experimental results show that the stealth embedding introduces no additional messages or signaling fields and adds less than 10% computational overhead over the nearest forward-secrecy baseline while additionally achieving covert activation, indicating that Stealth-5G-AKA is a practical approach to secure and covert key establishment for next-generation military 5G deployments.
title_zh: 面向具备隐身能力的5G-AKA：融合隐蔽信道的安全密钥分发，用于未来敏感军事应用
abstract_zh: 在战术性和间歇性连接的军事5G环境中，安全且隐蔽的密钥建立变得愈发重要，因为在这些环境中，认证流量可能被监听，且捕获的通信数据在传输后仍可能长期具有价值。然而，标准的第三代合作伙伴计划（3GPP）5G认证与密钥协商（5G-AKA）协议既不支持隐蔽密钥建立，也无法在其传统密钥层级之外提供前向保密性。为解决这一局限，本文提出了一种紧凑型增强协议——Stealth-5G-AKA，该协议将分段的隐蔽椭圆曲线迪菲-赫尔曼（ECDH）交换嵌入标准5G-AKA的挑战-响应信令中，而无需修改可见的消息流程或5G核心认证架构。归属网络将一个256位临时ECDH公钥值拆分为两个128位片段，并将其隐藏在连续的随机挑战消息中。用户设备（UE）在接收到两个片段后，重建出隐藏的公钥值，推导出一个隐蔽的共享密钥，并在生成传统锚密钥K<sub>SEAF</sub>的同时，生成一个隐蔽锚密钥K′<sub>SEAF</sub>。在Dolev-Yao攻击模型下，使用ProVerif工具进行的形式化验证表明，Stealth-5G-AKA能够保持密钥的机密性和双向认证，实现隐蔽执行过程的不可区分性，并在协议完成后即使用户的长期凭证遭到泄露，仍能为K′<sub>SEAF</sub>提供前向保密性。实验结果表明，该隐蔽嵌入机制无需增加额外消息或信令字段，计算开销比最接近的具备前向保密性的基线方案增加不足10%，同时实现了隐蔽激活功能，表明Stealth-5G-AKA是面向下一代军事5G部署的一种实用、安全且隐蔽的密钥建立方案。

title: A Parallel Hardware Architecture for the Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT)
authors: Rajesh Kumar Mahato, Madhav Prasad Pandey, Sushant Adhikari
publish: 2026 International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP)
abstract: The Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT) is a non-interpolated and non-decimated DFT algorithm for integer multiples of a power of two signal lengths. This paper presents a customized and parallel hardware architecture for the TFFT algorithm and compares the computational complexity of the proposed design with direct DFT and radix-2 FFT algorithms. The design have been implemented on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) using Verilog and follows the IEEE-754 single-precision floating-point standard. DSP58 primitives have been utilized to perform the required arithmetic operations, and the design is verified through simulation using the Vivado software environment. This paper also evaluates resource utilization and latency for different signal lengths, verifying that while the arithmetic operation requirements are lower than those of the direct DFT, the proposed approach achieves better memory optimization than the radix-2 FFT due to its support for a wider range of valid signal lengths.
title_zh: 一种用于无旋转因子快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）的并行硬件架构
abstract_zh: Twiddless快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）是一种针对2的幂的整数倍长度信号的非插值、非抽取型离散傅里叶变换（DFT）算法。本文提出了一种针对TFFT算法的定制化并行硬件架构，并将所提出设计的计算复杂度与直接DFT和基-2 FFT算法进行了比较。该设计采用Verilog语言在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上实现，遵循IEEE-754单精度浮点数标准。设计中利用DSP58原语完成所需的算术运算，并通过Vivado软件环境进行仿真验证。本文还评估了不同信号长度下的资源占用率和延迟情况，结果表明：尽管该设计的算术运算需求低于直接DFT，但由于支持更广泛的合法信号长度，其内存优化效果优于基-2 FFT。

title: Smart Grid Framework Leveraging Advanced Semiconductor Nodes and RISC Nodes with Agentic AI, Machine Learning, Blockchain, Quantum Computing, and Next-Generation 6G/7G Communication Architectures for Sustainable and Autonomous Energy Systems
authors: Seshua Sai M, Adinath M, Sivaraman T, Ithihas Thiruvenkata Durai, Sharan S, Suryaprakasam B, Shamili E
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: This paper presents a novel smart grid architecture that integrates next-generation semiconductor technologies, RISC-V edge nodes, agentic artificial intelligence, blockchain authentication, quantum assisted optimization, and future 6G/7G communications to enable sustainable, autonomous energy distribution. We propose specialized hardware designs (e.g. Qualcomm 5G/6G IoT chipsets and RISC-V SoCs) coupled with an agentic AI layer for real-time grid decision-making. Transactions are secured using a Hyperledger Fabric blockchain, while IBM Qiskit–based quantum algorithms optimize grid operations. We simulate the framework using Synopsys/Cadence for VLSI design, TensorFlow for AI models, Qiskit for quantum optimization, and Hyperledger for blockchain. Results show significant improvements in energy efficiency and latency: energy efficiency increases from 65% to 92% (+41%), and latency drops from 18 ms to 5 ms (–72%). The integrated system ensures high data integrity and low communication delay, supporting the move toward carbon-neutral, self-healing grids. Detailed comparisons with traditional grids are presented, showing clear gains across key performance metrics
title_zh: 利用先进半导体节点和RISC架构，结合代理式人工智能、机器学习、区块链、量子计算以及下一代6G/7G通信架构的智能电网框架，实现可持续且自主的能源系统
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型智能电网架构，该架构融合了下一代半导体技术、基于RISC-V的边缘节点、自主代理型人工智能（agentic AI）、区块链认证、量子辅助优化以及未来的6G/7G通信技术，以实现可持续、自主化的能源分配。我们提出了专用硬件设计（例如高通5G/6G物联网芯片组和RISC-V片上系统），并结合一层自主代理AI，用于实时电网决策。交易通过Hyperledger Fabric区块链进行安全保护，同时采用基于IBM Qiskit的量子算法优化电网运行。我们使用Synopsys/Cadence进行VLSI设计仿真，TensorFlow训练AI模型，Qiskit执行量子优化，并利用Hyperledger实现区块链功能。实验结果表明，该框架在能效和延迟方面均有显著提升：能源效率从65%提高到92%（提升41%），延迟从18毫秒降低至5毫秒（减少72%）。集成系统确保了高数据完整性与低通信延迟，有力支持向碳中和、自愈型电网的演进。文中还提供了与传统电网的详细对比，显示出在关键性能指标上的明显优势。

title: Application-Aware Early-Exit Fault Classification for Video Decoder Using Miter-Based Analysis
abstract: Traditional structural testing often overlooks the actual impact of hardware faults on system-level applications, especially in error-tolerant components like video decoders. This work presents an application-aware fault classification framework that integrates a miter-based architecture with an early-exit strategy, using object detection accuracy as the evaluation target. By monitoring the accumulation of output errors during video decoding, the framework identifies application-critical faults early-typically within the first six frames of a 300-frame sequence-based on a predefined error threshold. Experimental results show that this approach achieves 100% classification precision while reducing simulation time by over 98%.
title_zh: 基于Miter分析的视频解码器应用感知早期退出故障分类
abstract_zh: 传统的结构化测试通常忽视了硬件故障对系统级应用的实际影响，尤其是在视频解码器等容错性较强的组件中。本文提出了一种面向应用的故障分类框架，该框架结合基于混成器（miter-based）的架构与早退出（early-exit）策略，并以目标检测准确率作为评估指标。通过监控视频解码过程中输出误差的累积情况，该框架能够在300帧序列的前六帧内，根据预设的误差阈值，及早识别出对应用至关重要的关键故障。实验结果表明，该方法在实现100%分类精度的同时，将仿真时间减少了98%以上。

title: EMBER: A Cycle-based Framework for Early-Stage Reliability Assessment in Parametric RTL Designs
authors: Alessandro Veronesi, Leticia Maria Bolzani Pöhls, Michele Favalli, Milos Krstic, Davide Bertozzi
abstract: Modern trends towards higher architectural complexity and smaller technology nodes do not align with the requirement for reliability that many application domains expose. While system robustness remains one of the most critical aspects for missioncritical application domains, the currently available tools allow designers to accurately investigate the reliability only at the late design stages, limiting the effectiveness of their intervention in addressing architectural vulnerabilities.In this context, this paper presents a novel framework for early-stage reliability assessment that enables fast evaluations to guide the RTL design process, without compromising analysis quality or relying on imprecise high-level fault injection models. In the presented analysis, the paper shows how the proposed framework leads to a significant time saving when targeting highly parametric hardware designs, achieving up to 79 x compile time reduction, and up to $37.6 x$ simulation time reduction when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
title_zh: EMBER：一种基于循环的参数化RTL设计早期可靠性评估框架
abstract_zh: 现代趋势倾向于更高的架构复杂性和更小的工艺节点，这与许多应用领域对可靠性的要求不相匹配。尽管系统鲁棒性对于任务关键型应用领域而言仍然是最关键的方面之一，但目前可用的工具仅允许设计者在设计后期阶段准确地评估可靠性，从而限制了其应对架构层面脆弱性的有效性。在此背景下，本文提出了一种用于早期可靠性评估的新型框架，该框架能够在不牺牲分析质量或依赖不精确的高层次故障注入模型的前提下，实现快速评估以指导RTL设计流程。本文的分析表明，针对高度参数化的硬件设计，所提出的框架相较于其他最先进的方法，可显著节省时间，编译时间最多减少79倍，仿真时间最多减少37.6倍。

title: Design of a VLSI Enabled Quantum-Resistant Blockchain Architecture with AI (Artificial Intelligence)–Driven Intrusion Detection System and Computer Vision for Secure Embedded, Internet of Things Edge Systems
authors: Adinath M, Parvesh S M, Vinay Bhopana, Abinandhan R, Pranavesh Aravind, Aadhitya S, Seshua Sai M, Shamili E
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: The paper describes a new architecture, which closely incorporates VLSI-optimized post-quantum cryptography with blockchain, deep-learning-based intrusion detection, and computer vision to secure IoT-edge and autonomous vehicle networks. A hardware based implementation of a lattice-based crypto-engine (LUT-CLA-QTL design) with quantum-resistant authentication and ledger operation is proposed to be synthesized with 7-3 nm ASIC flows [1] [2]. These lattice signatures are implemented with a permissioned blockchain protocol to authenticate IoT devices and offer data integrity in resource-constrained edge networks. At the same time, an AI-based intrusion detection system (IDS) is implemented in the edge, using hybrid CNN-LSTM models, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and transformer-based models, which are quantized through the use of TensorFlow Lite or PyTorch Mobile to make inferences on-the-edge [3] [4]. Computer vision modules (e.g. object detectors based on YOLOv8) offer situational threat awareness (e.g. identifying illegal individuals or vehicles through smart cameras) and inject corresponding alerts into the blockchain. We used Cadence and Synopsys flows ( Cadence Genus/ Inno vus, Synopsys Design Compiler ) to verify ASIC/FPGA with the architecture. Multi-nanometer gains (e.g. 0.45 mm2 at 3 nm, 1.00 ns, 35 mW) and FPGA verification on Xilinx UltraScale+ (3500 LUTs, 3.2 ns, 90 mW) [7] [8] are demonstrated by the ASIC results (Table 1). Deep models give over 95% accuracy of IDS with standard IoT data, and YOLOv8 gives real-time detection accuracy (~80-90) on surveillance applications. The built-in system has strong authentication, low-latency encryption, and high detection, which is appropriate to secure autonomous vehicles and intelligent city IoT.
title_zh: 一种支持VLSI的抗量子区块链架构设计，结合人工智能驱动的入侵检测系统与计算机视觉，用于安全的嵌入式物联网边缘系统
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种新型架构，该架构将面向VLSI优化的后量子密码学与区块链、基于深度学习的入侵检测以及计算机视觉紧密结合，以保障物联网边缘（IoT-edge）和自动驾驶汽车网络的安全。提出了一种基于硬件实现的格密码引擎（LUT-CLA-QTL设计），支持抗量子攻击的身份认证与账本操作，并可综合应用于7-3 nm的专用集成电路（ASIC）流程[1][2]。这些格基签名通过许可型区块链协议实现，用于对物联网设备进行身份认证，并在资源受限的边缘网络中保障数据完整性。同时，在边缘端部署了基于人工智能的入侵检测系统（IDS），采用混合CNN-LSTM模型、图神经网络（GNN）以及基于Transformer的模型，并利用TensorFlow Lite或PyTorch Mobile进行模型量化，实现在边缘侧的高效推理[3][4]。计算机视觉模块（例如基于YOLOv8的目标检测器）提供态势感知能力（如通过智能摄像头识别非法人员或车辆），并将相应的告警信息写入区块链。我们使用Cadence和Synopsys工具流（Cadence Genus/Innovus，Synopsys Design Compiler）对该架构进行ASIC/FPGA验证。ASIC实现结果展示了多纳米级性能优势（例如在3 nm工艺下面积为0.45 mm²，延迟1.00 ns，功耗35 mW），并在Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA上完成验证（3500个LUT，延迟3.2 ns，功耗90 mW）[7][8]。深度学习模型在标准物联网数据集上的入侵检测准确率超过95%，而YOLOv8在监控应用中实现了实时检测精度（约80-90%）。该集成系统具备强身份认证、低延迟加密和高检测精度等优势，适用于保障自动驾驶汽车和智慧城市物联网系统的安全。
